title: As a shopper, I want to view a product detail page so that I can see full information before purchasing

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper clicks on a product in the catalogue
acceptance_criteria.then: they see product name, full description, price, all available images, stock quantity, and category
the main image updates to show the selected thumbnail

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper selects a quantity greater than available stock
acceptance_criteria.then: the quantity is capped at available stock and a message explains why

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper navigates directly to a product URL
acceptance_criteria.then: they see a 404 page with a link back to the catalogue

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper is on a product detail page
acceptance_criteria.then: the item is added to their cart and the cart icon shows the updated count

non_functional_requirements.performance: Product detail page loads in under 1 second at P95
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: Images have descriptive alt text. Quantity input has label and min/max attributes.
non_functional_requirements.security: Product ID in URL validated as UUID — not a sequential integer
